input.question: Which courses have the most prerequisites?

payload.question: Which courses have the most prerequisites?

output.sql:
WITH prereq_counts AS (
  SELECT
    c.course_id AS course_id,
    c.course_name AS course_name,
    COUNT(cp.prerequisite_course_id) AS prereq_count
  FROM courses c
  LEFT JOIN course_prerequisites cp
    ON c.course_id = cp.course_id
  GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_name,
  prereq_count
FROM prereq_counts
ORDER BY prereq_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

visualization.title: Top 10 courses by number of prerequisites

payload.sql:
WITH prereq_counts AS (
  SELECT
    c.course_id AS course_id,
    c.course_name AS course_name,
    COUNT(cp.prerequisite_course_id) AS prereq_count
  FROM courses c
  LEFT JOIN course_prerequisites cp
    ON c.course_id = cp.course_id
  GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_name,
  prereq_count
FROM prereq_counts
ORDER BY prereq_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
